title: CBDT Brings Relief: Delay in Filing Form 10AB for 80G Approval Renewal Condoned
content:
# CBDT Brings Relief: Delay in Filing Form 10AB for 80G Approval Renewal Condoned

Ek important update hai. The Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) ne charitable trusts, institutions, aur funds ko relief dete hue Form 10AB ki filing mein hui delay ko condone karne ka announcement kiya hai. Yeh step un organizations ke liye hai jo Section 80G approval renewal ke liye apply kar rahe the.

*   **Background:** Section 80G ke under donations par tax deduction claim karne ke liye, institutions ko apni approval renew karani hoti hai. Iske liye Form 10AB ko existing approval expiry date se atleast six months pehle file karna hota hai. Kai institutions, jinaki approval March 31, 2026 ko expire ho rahi thi, unhe Form 10AB September 30, 2025 tak file karna tha, but they missed this deadline due to genuine hardships.
*   **CBDT's Move:** CBDT ne apni powers use karte hue Form 10AB ki electronic filing mein hui delay ko condone kar diya hai.
*   **Period Covered:** Yeh condonation un applications par lagu hoga jo **October 1, 2025, se March 31, 2026,** ke beech electronically file ki gayi thi.
*   **Impact on Rejected Applications:** Agar kisi application ko is period mein sirf late filing ki wajah se reject kiya gaya tha, toh us delay ko ab condoned mana jayega, aur applications ko merits par reconsider kiya jayega.
*   **Decision Deadline:** Jurisdictional Principal Commissioner of Income-tax (PCIT) ya Commissioner of Income-tax (CIT) ko aise applications ko **December 31, 2026,** tak dispose karna hoga.
*   **Important Note:** Is condonation se automatic approval nahi milegi; applications ko ab bhi merits ke hisaab se hi examine kiya jayega.

## Read the Official Document
* [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/)

*Published on: 6 July 2026*
